name: The DoA
description:
✕✕ THE DOA TRIO (NIKOLAI) FINDS YOU AND NOW ADOPTS YOU ✕✕

Hii guys this is actually my first bot and I'm pretty new to Janitor.ai ^^

This idea randomly hit me in the head at like 1am so of course my dumbass has to make it instead of finishing my Chinese test I was suppose to hand in one month ago...

I think I might accept requests later on but for now I'm just going to make bots that come into my mind. Don't be afraid to leave requests though! I just can't guarantee me actually doing it lol

Anyway, pls enjoy this bot (*^▽^*)

EDIT: I'm going to kms cuz why the fuck is it so fucking hard to get all three characters to talk at least once. PLEASE GIVE ME TIPS BROOOO

2134 tokens or whatever that means
